hooks.prompt: If the file_path ends with .html and is inside a plan-viewer output directory (typically ~/plan-viewer/ or the value of PLAN_VIEWER_DIR, excluding index.html and glossary.html): (1) Have you Read SKILL.md, page-template.md, and writing-guide.md in this session BEFORE writing? Memory-based reproduction causes partial omissions of templates and writing rules (confirmed 2026-02-28). If not Read, cancel this Write, Read these files first, then rewrite. (2) Does the HTML contain FAB button group (.fab-group), annotation UI (banner, overlay, popover, toast), and all JavaScript? These are essential for mobile question feedback — without them users cannot ask questions about content. If missing, cancel and rewrite with the complete template.
